name: Agent
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Agent was created to simplify data fetching process and to be framework and platform agnostic. The Agent can be easily injected in jQuery, Angular, or even React-Native project with minimal overhead."}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Integrate"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "🚧Obtaining API Key", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Before you start, you need to get the API Key in order to get access to the API. You need to follow the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "[NO MATCH]", "target": "_self", "children": [{"text": "onboarding process"}]}, {"text": " or get the API key from your "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://dashboard.findify.io/settings/integration", "target": "_self", "children": [{"text": "Merchant Dashboard"}]}, {"text": "."}]}], "appearance": "neutral"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Script Tag"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In order to use Agent directly in the browser, you need to include the following scripts on your page:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "HTML"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "<script src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@findify /analytics@3 .5.3/dist/findify-analytics.js\"></script><!-- Findify Agent --><script src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@findify /agent@1 .5.2/dist/findify-agent.js\"></script>", "code": true}]}], "lang": "xml"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Agent and Analytics will be available in the "}, {"text": "window", "code": true}, {"text": " object as "}, {"text": "window.FindifyAnalytics", "code": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "window.FindifyAgent", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "NPM"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you are using NPM, just install the libraries from our public NPM registry."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Shell"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "npm i --save @findify /agent @findify /analytics"}]}], "lang": "dart"}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Minimal Setup"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The minimal setup requires you only to create the instance of Analytics and Agent. The rest will be handled automatically."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JavaScriptNodeJS"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "var API_KEY ='YOUR_API_KEY';var Autocomplete = window.FindifyAgent.Autocomplete;var Analytics = window.FindifyAnalytics;// Initialize librariesvar analyticsInstance = Analytics({ key: API_KEY });var autocompleteInstance = new Autocomplete({  key: API_KEY,  user: analytics.user});// Subscribe to changes in suggestionsautocompleteInstance.on('change:suggestions', function(suggestions) {  // render suggestion});// Send request with some queryautocompleteInstance.set('q', 'white');", "code": true}]}], "lang": "ada"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
